name: Broccoli Amandine
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub potatoes well and dry them. Prick each potato with a fork.
2. Bake the potatoes in a 425 degree F oven for 55-60 minutes, or until soft.
3. In a medium saucepan, heat oil over medium heat. Sauté onion and garlic until the onion is tender.
4. Add broccoli, chicken broth, and vinegar to the saucepan. Bring to a boil.
5. Cover and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until broccoli is crisp-tender.
6. Mix cornstarch with soy sauce in a separate bowl.
7. Stir the mixture into the pan and return it to a boil. Cook for 1 minute.
8. Just before serving, stir in almonds and pimientos.
9. Make an 'X' on the top of each potato using the tines of a fork. Gently push up some of the potato with the tip of your finger to create a pocket.
10. Spoon the topping over each blossomed potato.
